name: Space Burst
author: Poki
description: Space Burst is a platform game where you step into the boots of an adventurous astronomer exploring mysterious platforms in the vastness of space. Armed with a jetpack, you'll need to collect fuel as you navigate tricky obstacles. But be careful! Each fuel you pick up only gives you one chance to fly, so plan your moves wisely! Gather all the coins scattered along your path to complete each level. Ready to take on the challenge and burst through space? How to play Space Burst? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Use the jetpack: space bar or H Restart: R Pause: P Who created Space Burst? Space Burst is created by KezArts. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Space Burst for free? You can play Space Burst for free on Poki. Can I play Space Burst on mobile devices and desktop? Space Burst can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
